title: Nee Iralu Jotheyalli
subTitle: The machinations of fate bring the unlikely pair Rachana and Krishna together. Meanwhile, their bond tries to survive Urmila's wrath.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: Heartbroken, Anupama faces rejection when Anuj fails to identify her. Later, driven by concern, she searches for him again, only to discover him unresponsive on the roadside.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: In a ruse to keep Titu and Kinjal away from Anupama, Vanraj issues them an ultimatum. Meanwhile, Anuj misidentifies Nandita's daughter as Aadhya.

title: Ninna Jothe Nanna Kathe
subTitle: After Bhoomi and Ajith tie the knot out of convenience, they strive to build a bond and draw strength from each other in tough situations.

title: Vasudeva Kutumba
subTitle: The familiar routines of Swati and her family crumble when her father passes away. Amid financial issues, betrayal and hurdles of responsibility, Swati must rebuild the family.

title: Udho Udho Shri Renuka Yellamma
subTitle: Renuka, the daughter of a royal family, and Yellamma, the daughter of a village family, are both reincarnations of Goddess Parvati, determined to protect the world from evil.

title: Jai Lalitha
subTitle: With her quick wit and visionary approach, Lalitha becomes the village head. However, the real challenge arises when she is confronted with family politics.

title: Aase
subTitle: The lives of two ordinary people, Surya and Meena, collide. While the former is aimless with no hope in life, the latter smiles through adversities and makes sacrifices for her family's happiness.

title: Nee Iralu Jotheyalli
subTitle: The machinations of fate bring the unlikely pair Rachana and Krishna together. Meanwhile, their bond tries to survive Urmila's wrath.

title: Gauri Shankara
subTitle: Shankara meets Gowri, a principled young woman, and falls deeply in love with her. As their relationship blossoms, their love is tested by trials and tribulations.

title: Sharade
subTitle: Sharade goes with her daughter to live with her husband but learns that he is with another woman. When her husband abandons her, she decides to stay in the city and raise her child.

title: Bombat Bhojana
subTitle: The host takes the viewers to different areas and restaurants in India to share the experience of trying a variety of dishes prepared by local chefs.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: When Anuj grasps a pen, Anupamaa's spirits lift, seeing it as a sign of his recovery. Subsequently, Vanraj investigates Anuj's situation and cautions him against maintaining contact with Anupamaa.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
subTitle: As fragments of his past resurface, Anuj shares a devastating revelation with Anupama. However, she continues to cling to hope, asserting that Adhya will make a return.

title: Matadu Matadu Mallige
subTitle: A driven yet speech-impaired Swaragini regains her self-assurance when Sandeep arrives, acting as a beacon of hope and reigniting her determination.
